hero.title: Everything You Need to Uncover the Truth
hero.subtitle: From document ingestion to contradiction detection, FactWeaver provides the complete platform for investigative journalism at any scale.

graphRag.title: GraphRAG Intelligence
graphRag.description: Our knowledge graph understands the deep relationships between people, organizations, transactions, and documents. Ask questions in natural language and discover connections that would take months to find manually.
benefits: Natural language queries across all your documents

visualization.title: The Holoboard
visualization.description: A 3D, WebGL-powered detective board that brings your investigation to life. Pin entities, trace connections, and use the timeline slider as a 'DVR for corruption' to watch relationships form over time.

ingestion.title: The LeakLoader
ingestion.description: Universal adapter for the messy reality of leaked data. Drag-and-drop any format - emails, PDFs, spreadsheets, database dumps - and watch as FactWeaver extracts entities, matches sanctions lists, and builds your knowledge graph.

governance.title: The Fact-Linter
governance.description: Active contradiction detection that works as you write. Our Chrome and Word extension highlights claims that conflict with your evidence base, providing source citations to strengthen your reporting.

additional.title: And Much More
additional.subtitle: Every feature designed to help you investigate faster and publish with confidence.

timeMachine.title: Timeline Analysis
timeMachine.description: Scrub through time to see when entities first appeared, when relationships formed, and how networks evolved.

personas.title: Team Collaboration
personas.description: Secure workspaces for investigative teams with role-based access and audit logging.

search.title: Semantic Search
search.description: Find relevant documents even when you don't know the exact keywords to search for.

alerts.title: The Mole
alerts.description: Background monitoring that alerts you when new documents connect to your investigation targets.

analytics.title: Investigation Analytics
analytics.description: Track your progress, identify gaps in your evidence, and prioritize leads.

workflows.title: Export & Publish
workflows.description: Generate timelines, relationship charts, and evidence packages for publication.

security.title: Air-Gap Ready
security.description: Full functionality on isolated networks for maximum source protection.

performance.title: Leak-Scale Ready
performance.description: Built to handle terabytes of documents and millions of entities.

capabilities.title: Built for Real Investigations
capabilities.subtitle: Capabilities designed for the complexity and sensitivity of investigative journalism.

codeAnalysis.title: Multi-Format Support
codeAnalysis.description: PST, MBOX, PDF, CSV, HTML, JSON, and more. We handle the formats leaked data actually comes in.

docSync.title: Entity Resolution
docSync.description: Automatically match variations of names and organizations across documents and sources.

multiRepo.title: Multi-Source Fusion
multiRepo.description: Combine leaked documents with public records, corporate filings, and sanctions databases.

globalScale.title: Local-First Privacy
globalScale.description: Deploy on your own infrastructure for complete source protection. Zero data egress.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Investigations?
cta.subtitle: Join investigative teams worldwide who trust FactWeaver to uncover the truth.
